name: The Ramanujan Challenge For AI

description: arXiv:2607.09721v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: To help evaluate the mathematical skills of current AI systems, we present a set of formulas for fundamental mathematical constants. These problems are attractive for AI evaluation because they are concrete and can be checked numerically to arbitrary precision, yet proving them may require non-obvious mathematics. Mathematical constants such as...
author: Michael Shalyt, Rotem Kalisch, Carsten Schneider, Hila Barkan, Elyasheev Leibtag, John Campbell, Shachar Weinbaum, Tali Monderer, Ashvni Narayanan, Ido Kaminer
